title: The Paper Trail
content: You spend hours in your office, the glow of the desk lamp reflecting off the complex spreadsheets of the Atlas Foundation.||By cross-referencing the audit from the restaurant with the chat logs from the drive, a pattern emerges. It’s not just investment; it’s a 'Circular Debt' scheme.||Atlas uses high-interest loans to shell companies that exist only on paper. These companies then buy 'services' from the Syndicate, effectively laundering millions every month. Vane had found the primary account numbers.||📝 FILES UPDATED: Complex Financial Schemes discovered.
